name: safe-docx
description: AI-native Word document editing for legal documents with stable paragraph anchors and deterministic DOCX operations.
long_description:
Safe Docx lets Claude work directly with .docx files on your local filesystem. It provides stable paragraph IDs (jr_para_*) for precise editing while preserving formatting and structure.

Core capabilities include reading/searching content, formatting-preserving edits and inserts, deterministic layout controls, tracked-changes generation, comments, comparisons, and revision extraction.

tools.name: open_document
tools.description: Open a Word document for editing.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read document content with stable paragraph IDs.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search for text patterns in the document.

tools.name: smart_edit
tools.description: Replace text in a paragraph while preserving formatting.

tools.name: smart_insert
tools.description: Insert a new paragraph relative to an anchor paragraph.

tools.name: download
tools.description: Save clean/tracked output document variants to disk.

tools.name: format_layout
tools.description: Apply deterministic paragraph/table layout formatting controls.

tools.name: accept_changes
tools.description: Accept tracked changes in the document body.

tools.name: get_session_status
tools.description: Get editing session metadata and status.

tools.name: clear_session
tools.description: Clear one session or all sessions.

tools.name: duplicate_document
tools.description: Duplicate a document and open a fresh session.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment or threaded reply.

tools.name: compare_documents
tools.description: Create a tracked-changes redline between original and revised documents.

tools.name: extract_revisions
tools.description: Extract tracked-change revisions as structured JSON.
